description: A project manager needs to schedule technicians for the various tasks in a newly approved project.

nodes.task_description: Review the project plan to identify the required skills and hours for each task.

expected_outcome.value: The PM has a clear list of resource requirements.

nodes.task_description: Check the resource scheduling tool for technician availability and skill sets.

expected_outcome.value: The PM identifies which technicians are available and have the right skills (e.g., networking, server admin).

nodes.task_description: Assign technicians to the project tasks in the scheduling tool.

expected_outcome.value: The project is fully resourced, and technicians can see their assigned tasks.
